title: ruellia ciliosa var. parviflora
intro: Ruellia ciliosa var. parviflora, also known as the Dwarf Flame Trumpet or Flame Butterfly Orchid, is a perennial herb native to tropical Asia, belonging to the family Acanthaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Ruellia ciliosa var. parviflora include reducing inflammation, improving wound healing, and potentially lowering blood sugar levels. The plant can be prepared into various herbal preparations, such as tea, infusions, and tinctures, to harness its medicinal properties.
